name: Mirage 4pk Wicker Stacking Chairs - Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant Iron Frame Patio Seating
description:
When it comes to hosting, you will need chairs for everyone that are both stylish and comfortable. Featuring a refined wicker finish and crisp, modern curves, our set of dining chairs offers a classic and delightfully polished look to any outdoor space. These chairs are conveniently stackable, making it easy for you to store when your guests are gone and you need your backyard back. Finished with silver-tipped feet, this set is sure to transform any outdoor dining area into a sophisticated masterpiece.

POLYETHYLENE RATTAN: Featuring a long-lasting woven finish, this style is not only incredibly durable but also provides a versatile appearance. The intricate details of this material allow this piece to blend seamlessly with your decor.

STACKABLE: These chairs are stackable, allowing you to place these atop one another when not in use. This lets you easily store these chairs so that you can save valuable space for when the party really gets going.

WEATHER RESISTANT: This chair set is designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. Each chair is 24.00" W x 24.25" D x 32.50" H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of these charming chairs.

NO ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: This chair set comes ready to use straight out of the box. This comes as a set of four.
